description: Aggregate task retrospectives into project memory. Computes effectiveness scores, derives Model Policy and Skip Policy, generates learned agents, maintains Agent Routing, and prunes underperforming agents.

task-retrospective.json.note: Each retrospective is an object; the skill globs for multiple files

audit-reports.note: Each audit report is an object; the skill globs for multiple files

dynos_patterns.md.description: Learned patterns file with top finding categories, executor reliability, avg repair cycles, prevention rules, spawn efficiency, effectiveness scores, model policy, skip policy, baseline policy, agent routing
